# File Ownership Rules

## Single-Owner Files (Do Not Edit Without Coordination)

The following UI files are strictly owned by the Orchestrator/Shell team. Downstream agents **MUST NOT** edit these directly to add tabs or features.

*   `frontend/src/components/shell/ToolbarBand.tsx`
*   `frontend/src/components/shell/LeftRail.tsx`
*   `frontend/src/components/sidebar/SidebarPanel.tsx`
*   `frontend/src/components/inspector/InspectorPanel.tsx`
*   `frontend/src/components/shell/WorkspacePage.tsx`
